calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Hearing And Judgment Quiting Title And Establishing Title To Real Property Pursuant To Destroyed Land Records
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Richard Wallace, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Aerc 8th and Harrison, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company,
No appearance by defaulted defendant All Persons Unknown, Claiming Any Legal Or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the property described in the complaint Adverse to Plaintiff's Title, or any Cloud on Plaintiff's Title thereto,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witnesses, Tony Duplisse and Jackie Luk, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
3A-Grant Deed dated 6/30/2006
3B-Grant Deed dated 5/28/2013
5-Tax Records of Parcel
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

1. As of May 28, 2013, Plaintiff is the sole owner in fee simple absolute of the "Gap Property" situated within the property located at 350 Eight Street and 65 Ringold Street, San Francisco, California (Assessor's Lots 3 and 15, Block 3756), and described as follows:

All that real property situated in the City and County of San Francisco, State of California, being a portion of 100 Vara Block No. 417, more particularly being described as follows:

COMMENCING at the most Easterly corner of that Lot of Land as described in that certain Document entitled "IN THE SUPERIOR COURT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, IN AND FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, NO. 2709", recorded January 7, 1908, in Book 139, at Page 3 (Instrument Number 24347), Official Records of City and County of San Francisco; thence along the exterior boundary of said Lot of Land the following four (4) courses: 1) Northwesterly 350.23 feet, 2) Southwesterly 275.00 feet to the POINT OF BEGINNING, 3) Southeasterly 75.00 feet, and 4) Southwesterly 0.67 foot to a line parallel with, distant 275.00 feet Northeasterly, measured at right angles from the Northeasterly line of 9th Street (82.5 foot wide); thence Northwesterly along said parallel line 75.00 feet to the Southeasterly line of Ringold Street (3 foot wide), thence Northeasterly along last said line, 0.67 foot to the POINT OF BEGINNING.

CONTAINING 50 square feet, more or less.

2. Plaintiff's title in the Gap Property is established and quieted in rem against all the world. No other person or entity other than Plaintiff has any claim, right, title, interest, or lien whatsoever in or to the Gap Property, or any part thereof, except for such interests pursuant to documents recorded in the Public Records of the City and County of San Francisco, California.

3. All persons and entities, except those with interests in the Gap Property pursuant to documents recorded in the Public Records of the City and County of San Francisco, California, are forever restrained and enjoined from claiming, or in any manner asserting, any claim, right, title, interest, or lien, in or to the Gap Property or any part thereof, adversely to Plaintiff.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
